release.notes:
Tracks without producer credits are described in the sleeve notes as "not produced".

SP 70054 on spine & inner sleeve
SP-70054 on label

Electrosound Group Midwest, Inc. pressing identified by the hand-etched "Emw" in the runouts.

Pressing for A&M Records identified by 'B' code on the labels, below the track listings, on both sides.

Spline is labeled "DEAD LETTER OFFICE | B-SIDES COMPILED".
Labels printed "DEAD LETTER OFFICE".

Runout characters are etched.

videos.title: Ages Of You
videos.description:
Provided to YouTube by Universal Music Group

Ages Of You · R.E.M.

Dead Letter Office

℗ 1983 Capitol Records, LLC

Released on: 1987-01-01

Producer: Mitch Easter
Studio  Personnel, Remixer: Steve Fjelstad
